channel.title: Modern Man Skills
channel.description: Practical AI guidance and modern skills for capable men who refuse to get left behind. No hype. No jargon. No talking down.

item.title: AI as a Thinking Partner
item.description: The most underrated use of AI is as a quiet thinking partner for the big questions. Here’s how to use it well, and why a chatbot can sometimes be more useful than a friend.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: Before You Drop Real Money, Run It Past AI
item.description: Vehicles, appliances, gear, tools, electronics. How to use AI to make a real decision instead of getting lost in marketing language.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: How to Decode Insurance, Legal, and Tax Docs With AI
item.description: Insurance policies, contracts, medical reports, financial statements. How to use AI to actually understand the dense documents modern life keeps throwing at you.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: AI for the Conversation You've Been Avoiding
item.description: The hardest emails, the difficult talks with kids or parents, the conversations you've been putting off. How to use AI to think them through clearly first.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: How to Learn a New Topic Fast (When You're Already Busy)
item.description: Picking up a new hobby, skill, or interest at midlife? AI is the best learning tool we’ve ever had. Here’s how to use it well.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: How to Use AI for Money Decisions
item.description: A practical guide to using AI for financial thinking, preparing for advisor conversations, understanding documents, and pressure-testing decisions about money.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: How to Plan a Trip With AI (Without Getting Wikipedia Slop)
item.description: A real-world guide to using ChatGPT or Claude to plan trips that don’t suck. Specific prompts, real examples, and the mistakes most people make.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The AI Habit That Actually Holds Up
item.description: The difference between guys who get useful with AI and guys who don’t isn’t intelligence. It’s the habit. Here’s how to build one that lasts.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini
item.description: An honest, plain-English comparison of the three AI tools that actually matter, and which one to pick first.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The 60-Minute Digital Security Tune-Up
item.description: A practical, plain-English digital security tune-up for grown men. One hour, six moves, real protection. No paranoid bunker required.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: If Something Happens to Me, This Is the Folder They'll Need
item.description: A practical household operations file. Less doom-and-gloom, more what-happens-if-you’re-on-a-flight-and-something-needs-handling-now.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The Eight Folders That Run a Modern Household
item.description: The household reference system that keeps modern life from running on memory and luck. One obvious place for the stuff that matters.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: Things You Should Never Type Into an AI
item.description: A common-sense privacy framework for using AI without giving away the wrong things.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The AI Prompts I Use Almost Every Day
item.description: The art of getting good answers from AI. Real prompts, real reasoning, no engineering theater.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The Second-Act AI Playbook
item.description: For men thinking about a career change, side business, consulting, or what comes next, here’s how AI can help you explore without wasting months.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The AI Anxiety Nobody Talks About
item.description: A field note on the quiet anxiety many capable men carry about AI, the worry that they’re falling behind, becoming irrelevant, or missing something important.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The 5 a.m. Use Case
item.description: A short field note on the most underrated way grown men use AI: not for productivity, but for the quiet thinking nobody else is up for at 5 in the morning.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The Quiet Reset
item.description: A meditation on the moment many capable men hit somewhere in midlife, and why this is actually the best window for using AI to reshape what comes next.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The Real Skill Isn’t Using AI
item.description: A short note on the actual capability that separates men who get useful with AI from men who don't. It's not what you think.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: The Tools Stay, the Skills Compound.
item.description: The actual asset isn't AI. It's the meta-skill of learning new tools quickly. The men who'll be capable in 2030 aren't the ones who mastered ChatGPT, they're the ones who got good at learning whatever comes next.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: What AI Won’t Do For You
item.description: A contrarian read on the limits of AI for grown men. The things it doesn’t do well, the places it’ll let you down, and what you still need to do yourself.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: What the Heck Do I Do With AI?
item.description: A practical starting point for capable men who know AI matters, but don’t want hype, jargon, or another full-time job learning it.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)

item.title: Why I Stopped Tool-Hopping
item.description: A short field note on what happened when I stopped chasing every new AI tool and committed to one for ninety days.
item.author: brad@offroadsitrep.com (Brad Kowitz)
